servicex.libLead: Three catalogues for direct download, certificates in two languages — and the audit documents as self-service in the Trust Center.

libRows.s: Complete catalogue: dimensions, articles, system overview
Life-cycle data for LEED, BREEAM, DGNB
Ready-made texts for bills of quantities

servicex.supLead: Depending on the topic, a different path is fastest — all answered within one working day.

sup.d: Quotes, terms, delivery times and project consulting — or go straight to the five-step project enquiry.
Material, planning and processing questions, certificate verification, complaints per QA manual.
Four welding methods on video plus parameter tables — crew instruction by arrangement.

faq.q: Which documents do I need for planning?
faq.a: Product Range (dimensions and articles), Product Features (material data) and, depending on the project, the dimension tables on the products page. For tenders, GAEB texts and the EPD complete the package — both in the Trust Center.

faq.q: Where do I find the welding parameters?
faq.a: The DVS 2207-11 reference values are in the Academy — including step-by-step guides and failure prevention. Your welding-device manufacturer’s specifications always remain binding.

faq.q: How do I get certificates and audit documents?
faq.a: Download the ISO certificates here directly (DE/EN). Bundle GENAU policy, EPD, GAEB and QA manual in the Trust Center as an RFP package — requested with one click instead of days of waiting.
support@k-aqua.de — the quality and technical support team replies within one working day on material, planning and processing.

faq.q: What is the fastest way to a quote?
faq.a: The project enquiry: five steps, non-binding, with a personal reply from sales within one working day — direct from the manufacturer, no middlemen.

faq.q: Which languages are the documents in?
faq.a: Catalogues currently in English, certificates in German and English. This website works in three languages (DE/EN/AR) — further document languages on request via sales.
